function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Sweep token balances from the contract to `to`.
function_v0.name: claim

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the contract.

### Arguments
* `owner` - Controls `claim`, `set_owner`, `set_source_pool`.
* `backstop` - Blend backstop contract address.
* `usdc` - USDC token contract address.
* `source_pool` - The Blend pool where this contract holds a USDC supply
position. Withdrawals happen from here to fund fills.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Fill an interest auction. Any invoker can call this \xe2\x80\x94 the transaction
fee is expected to be paid via a fee-bump (e.g. via OpenZeppelin
Channels). USDC is withdrawn from the contract's supply position in
`source_pool`, converted to backstop LP tokens via Comet, and used to
fill the auction in `pool`. Any unused USDC is re-supplied back to
`source_pool` so it keeps earning interest.

### Arguments
* `pool` - Pool whose backstop has the interest auction.
* `fill_percent` - Percentage to fill (1-100).
* `max_usdc_in` - Upper bound of USDC to spend on this fill.
function_v0.name: fill_interest

function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Change the pool this contract withdraws USDC from.
function_v0.name: set_source_pool
